Amp_CA38.evidence: audlike_p Like a Stone overdrive clean amp sweep with Rocksmith closed: MarkII.vst3 with Cab Sim off measured band_mae_db 4.438 vs 4.992 for the current Tone3000 NAM route. Store the VST state as opaque so Rig Builder preserves params but skips the amp-trim IR stage that currently mutes VST amp routes.

Amp_GB50.evidence: Metallica For Whom the Bell Tolls uses Amp_GB50. Rig Builder resolves it to the bundled MrYEMS VST, but native_preset_full inserts _rb_amp_trim when params are readable; the trim IR stage rendered silent in FeedForge tests. Store the VST state as opaque so Rig Builder preserves the mapped knobs and skips the trim stage.

Bass_Amp_HT300B.evidence: Metallica For Whom the Bell Tolls uses Bass_Amp_HT300B. Rig Builder resolves it to the bundled SbrRedhead VST, but native_preset_full inserts _rb_amp_trim when params are readable; the trim IR stage rendered silent in FeedForge tests. Store the VST state as opaque so Rig Builder preserves the mapped knobs and skips the trim stage.
